name: docx-corpus-v2
description: Two-dimensional taxonomy for .docx document classification. Dimension 1 (document_type) describes the document's form/structure. Dimension 2 (topic) describes its subject domain. Each document gets one label per dimension.

document_types.label: Legal Documents
document_types.description: Contracts, agreements, legal notices, terms of service, regulations, statutes, and other legally binding or law-related documents

document_types.label: Forms & Applications
document_types.description: Fillable forms, applications, registration documents, surveys, questionnaires, and other documents designed for data collection

document_types.label: Reports & Analysis
document_types.description: Research reports, analysis documents, studies, assessments, evaluations, annual reports, and other documents presenting findings or data

document_types.label: Policies & Procedures
document_types.description: Policy documents, procedures, guidelines, manuals, handbooks, and other documents establishing rules or processes

document_types.label: Educational Materials
document_types.description: Curricula, syllabi, lesson plans, educational content, worksheets, study guides, academic papers, theses, and other teaching or learning materials

document_types.label: Correspondence
document_types.description: Letters, memos, announcements, communications, press releases, newsletters, and other direct communications

document_types.label: Technical Documentation
document_types.description: Technical specifications, manuals, documentation, standards, API docs, user guides, and other technical reference materials

document_types.label: Administrative Documents
document_types.description: Meeting minutes, agendas, schedules, organizational documents, resolutions, records, and other administrative materials

document_types.label: Creative & Marketing
document_types.description: Marketing materials, brochures, proposals, presentations, promotional content, and other persuasive or creative documents

document_types.label: Reference & Catalogs
document_types.description: Directories, catalogs, glossaries, FAQs, indices, lists, and other reference or lookup documents

topics.label: Government & Public Sector
topics.description: Government agencies, public administration, civic affairs, municipal matters, public policy, elections

topics.label: Education & Academia
topics.description: Schools, universities, educational institutions, academic programs, student affairs, research

topics.label: Healthcare & Medicine
topics.description: Medical, health services, hospitals, clinics, public health, pharmaceuticals, biotech

topics.label: Finance & Business
topics.description: Banking, finance, corporate, business operations, commerce, investment, insurance, real estate

topics.label: Legal & Judicial
topics.description: Law firms, courts, legal services, judicial matters, compliance, law enforcement

topics.label: Technology & Engineering
topics.description: IT, software, tech companies, digital services, engineering, telecommunications, R&D

topics.label: Environment & Energy
topics.description: Environmental protection, sustainability, conservation, climate, energy, natural resources, agriculture

topics.label: Nonprofit & NGO
topics.description: Charitable organizations, NGOs, community organizations, social services, international aid

topics.label: General / Other
topics.description: Documents that don't fit clearly into other topic categories, or span multiple domains equally
